chapter_title.en: Saying What is Right under Two Conditions

parts.text: حدثنا محمد بن علي ماجيلويه رضي الله عنه،
جعفر بن محمد عليهما السلام قال

text: : قال أبي عليه السلام: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: ما أنفق مؤمن من نفقة هي أحب إلى الله عز وجل من قول الحق في الرضا والغضب

en.dr-ali-peiravi: 2-82 Muhammad ibn Ali Majiluyih - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his uncle Muhammad ibn Abil-Qasim quoted Harun ibn Muslim, on the authority of Mus’adat ibn Sadaqah, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “Nothing that a believer does is loved by the Honorable the Exalted God more than saying what is right whether he is pleased or angry.”
